title: Trilegal acts on GSP Crop Science ₹400 crore IPO
description: GSP Crop Science Limited has made an initial public offering of equity shares aggregating to ₹400 crore.Trilegal advised GSP Crop Science on this IPO.The transaction team was led by Bhakta Patnaik (Partner) and Albin Thomas (Partner), with support from Bhargavi Mahajan (Counsel), Arsh Sinha (Senior Associate), Associates Akanksha Goel, Mukund Bali and Snehal Kaushal.Bhakta Patnaik, Albin ThomasGSP Crop Science is a research-driven agrochemical company engaged in the development and manufact
